Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 28 

MC_PLAN_ID 

LABEL: Managed Care Plan Identification Number 

DESCRIPTION: Contains the ID number the state issued to the managed care entity. 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_ID 

LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 12 

FILE(S): All Annual Managed Care Plan files 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: State-assigned unique managed care identification number. The field can
